message.content:
@startuml
participant "Nurse" as Nurse
participant "RecordAdverseReactionUI" as RecordAdverseReactionUI
participant "RecordAdverseReactionController" as RecordAdverseReactionController
participant "Company" as Company
participant "AdverseReactionStore" as AdverseReactionStore
participant "AdverseReactionDTO" as AdverseReactionDTO
participant "AdverseReactionMapper" as AdverseReactionMapper
participant "WaitingRoomStore" as WaitingRoomStore
participant "AdverseReaction" as AdverseReaction

participant "Nurse" as Actor

Actor "Nurse" as NurseActor

RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> AdverseReactionStore : 5 wstore = getWaitingRoomStore()
RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> AdverseReactionStore : 6 store = getRecordAdverseReactionStore()
RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> WaitingRoomStore : 7 snsu = getSNSUserInTheWaitingRoomByItsSNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> WaitingRoomStore : 8 vc = getVaccinationCenterBySNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> AdverseReactionStore : 9 ar = createAdverseReaction(snsu, advReact, vc)
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> AdverseReaction : 10 create(snsu, advReact, vc)
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> AdverseReaction : 11 validateAdverseReaction(ar)
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> AdverseReactionMapper : 12 toDTO(ar)
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> AdverseReactionMapper : 13 arDTO
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> RecordAdverseReactionUI : 14 arDTO
RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> NurseActor : 15 shows SNS User correspondent to the SNS Number and adverse reaction waiting for approval
RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> NurseActor : 16 confirms action
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> AdverseReactionStore : 17 saveAdverseReaction()
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> AdverseReactionStore : 18 saveAdverseReaction(ar)
AdverseReactionStore ..> AdverseReactionStore : 19 validateAdverseReaction(ar)
AdverseReactionStore ..> AdverseReactionStore : 20 addAdverseReaction(ar)

RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> RecordAdverseReactionController : 1
RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> RecordAdverseReactionController : 2
RecordAdverseReactionUI ..> RecordAdverseReactionController : 3
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 4
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 5
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 6
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 7
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 8
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 9
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 10
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 11
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 12
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 13
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 14
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 15
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 16
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 17
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 18
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 19
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 20
RecordAdverseReactionController ..> NurseActor : 21

@enduml
